corrected_formulas.D(S): best S-first-b STT cost minus best b-root STT cost

normalization.A_b_s: b-root Bellman-normal rays grouped by corrected F(L) active source-deletion branches s
normalization.weight_rays: primitive integer rays with coordinates in [0,2]

overclaim_guard: Finite exact evidence only.  This JSON does not prove the all-k proper-subset contraction lemma and does not claim public LP exactness on DS(k,1).
